weaken_templates.default: Reported gains in {task} remain specific to the reported {metric} and {constraint} conditions
weaken_templates.performance: Reported performance gains in {task} remain tied to the reported {metric} and {constraint} conditions
weaken_templates.tradeoff: The reported trade-off remains specific to the stated {constraint} conditions in {task}
weaken_templates.comparison: The reported comparison favors one system under the stated {task} setting, but the numeric margin is not portable without fuller {metric} and {constraint} detail
